lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: Oh no! What's broken?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Nothing's broken.

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: I'm sorry. I'm just a bit jumpy.

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: I'm in charge of all the metalworking of Dorgesh-Kaan. It's a big responsibility!

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: If something metal breaks I have to fix it. And lots of things are made of metal!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm sure you're up to the task!

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: I hope you're right.

sections.title: When trying to smelt ores at the furnace near Bartak

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: Get away from that furnace!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you worried I'll break your furnace?

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: I'm worried the furnace will break you!

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: It's set up to make glass and jewellery at the moment. It's not safe to use it to smelt ore. What if you accidentally burn yourself?

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: What if you accidentally burn yourself and the surface people see that you're burnt and use that as a pretext to attack us?

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: We'd all be killed in our sleep! And it would be my fault!

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: No, no, no, no, no - I can't take the risk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, calm down! I won't use your furnace. To smelt ore.

sections.title: When using the take option on the nearby tools

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um...may I use your tools?

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: Oh, no, no!

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: Those are highly technical tools. They're not like the tools you use on the surface.

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: What if you hurt yourself with them? I could be held responsible!

lines.speaker: Bartak
lines.text: No, I think it's best if I don't let anyone use the tools.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well.
